stages.native:
SELECT 
    MAX(timestamp) as last_update
FROM crypto_prices

SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(price_change_24h)::numeric, 2) as avg_change_percent
FROM crypto_prices 
WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(price_change_24h) > 1 THEN 'BULLISH 🐂'
        WHEN AVG(price_change_24h) < -1 THEN 'BEARISH 🐻'
        ELSE 'NEUTRAL ⚖️'
    END as sentiment
FROM crypto_prices 
WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as anomaly_count
FROM ai_insights
WHERE insight_type = 'price_anomaly'
  AND generated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'

SELECT 
    DATE(timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Warsaw') as date,
    MAX(CASE WHEN symbol = 'BTC' THEN price_usd END) as BTC,
    MAX(CASE WHEN symbol = 'ETH' THEN price_usd END) as ETH
FROM crypto_prices
WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY DATE(timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Warsaw')
ORDER BY date

SELECT 
    symbol,
    price_usd,
    price_change_24h,
    volume_24h
FROM crypto_prices
WHERE timestamp IN (
    SELECT MAX(timestamp) 
    FROM crypto_prices 
    GROUP BY symbol
)
ORDER BY volume_24h DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
    DATE(generated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Warsaw') as date,
    COUNT(*) as anomaly_count
FROM ai_insights
WHERE insight_type = 'price_anomaly'
  AND generated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY DATE(generated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Warsaw')
ORDER BY date

SELECT 
    generated_at as detected_at,
    content->>'affected_symbols' as symbols,
    content->>'alert_type' as alert_type,
    LEFT(content->>'detailed_explanations', 200) as explanation
FROM ai_insights
WHERE insight_type = 'price_anomaly'
ORDER BY generated_at DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
    COUNT(*) as total_failures
FROM ai_insights
WHERE insight_type = 'dq_failure'

SELECT 
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - last_successful_ts)) / 60 AS minutes_ago
FROM dq_metadata
WHERE table_name = 'crypto_prices'

SELECT rows_inserted
FROM dq_metadata
WHERE table_name = 'crypto_prices'
